title: Heart of Ender
description: A purple aura comes out of it, isn't it the Heart of Ender.
body: The Heart of Ender Mod is a Mod that adds Dimensions and Boss to Minecraft, as well as new blocks, items and equipment. Required Structure Gel API in dependency for 1.16.5/1.18.1 ! https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/structure-gel-api To begin, let's talk about the new ore that will be generated in the overworld: Azurium Once mined it will release a random amount of Azurium Nugget, with 9 you will be able to make an Azurium Ingot which will allow you to create tools, weapons, or armors. ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ky9fQtJg/images/d737760a79dfb58467bec24559d324ab6a6f6416.png) To enter the dimension you need Heart Ender Portal Block. Form a frame with these and then right click with a Flint and Azurium to light it. ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ky9fQtJg/images/1e1e68a39f485cc1f87310aee9b5a32aa77734f0.png) ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ky9fQtJg/images/f01bcefd8317e9b9d3cdff9376cf37ef0005a651.png) This rather purple Dimension is very dangerous, and shelters powerful monsters but also precious resources. ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ky9fQtJg/images/a47b997a3eaef1cfb59d6280d309e34182fb47a8.png) ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ky9fQtJg/images/b2a960cddced004094160664b2f78fc69d86ff82.png) You can collect some blocks for decoration. But this is nothing compared to Milathium, this mineral can be found in the dimension. By heating it you will get unusable Milathium, get 8 and merge this with a bucket of green lava to get an ingot, which can also create tools, weapons, or armors more powerful than the Azurium one. ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ky9fQtJg/images/74af7eace2f2e1da98ddd152f462ae4d2bd7e539.png) ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ky9fQtJg/images/7bbb56fd1cf107a6c5dbc64d94bcfe04fbafd7ae.png) During your visit to Heart of Ender you will come across structures like the Heart of Ender Ship, a place where you will come across powerful loot and also Heart of Ender Wart, an item that allows you to increase the level of potions to 3 (potion of speed 2 + heart of ender wart = potion of speed 3), it can also be grown on Dead Soul Sand. ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ky9fQtJg/images/c11f6a94ffb9a3cf79c8d0a0b157f3dcf39cfa13.png) ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ky9fQtJg/images/239338c14e7964bcc54e3c1cc8a60476455f3775.png) ## Monsters are also a very important part of Heart of Ender ! Look in the gallery for more details on the monsters ! https://modrinth.com/mod/heart-of-ender/gallery And even more to discover ! Versions : 1.12.2 : 100% [==========] 1.16.5 : 100% [==========] 1.18.1 : 100% [==========] Version 1.12.2 is now finished I won't add any more content to this one except some problem resolution and performance.
